title: Senior Teacher - FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd!
